$schema_docs.description: IOC list for the OAuth & Shadow AI Control Audit Dashboard. Match is on client_id only — app name is informational, never used as a match key.

fields.client_id: OAuth Client ID (Google) or appId (Microsoft). Primary match key.
fields.name: Human-readable app name. Informational only.
fields.platform: One of: google, microsoft, any. Scopes the match to the relevant platform.
fields.severity: One of: critical, high, medium, low. Drives IOC banner and row highlighting.
fields.source: Where this IOC came from — breach disclosure, threat intel feed, internal finding, etc.
fields.added: ISO 8601 date when the entry was added to this list.

iocs.name: Context.ai
iocs.notes: OAuth app used by Context.ai to access Gmail and Drive. Breach disclosed April 2026.
